title: Extra Features Optimized
description: Modpack aimed at optimizing and impovments on client side
body:
# ⚙️Extra Features Optimized
Extra features optimized (exo) - is a modpack aimed at adding Optifine features and improving the game experience on the client side without adding global mods.
**Note: If your fps is lower than in other modpacks you can disable BetterF3 and your fps will increase.**
# 🎆Features
<details>
<summary>Optifine Features</summary>

- **[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)** - basic mod for optimization
- **[Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)** - mod to improve basic rendering mechanics
- **[Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhanced-block-entities)** - mod to reduce block entity FPS lag
- **[Fabric Skyboxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabricskyboxes)** - adds support for sky changes with resource packs
- **[Dynamic Lights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights)** - adds dynamic lighting
- **[Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes)** - adds support for Optifine capes as well as capes from other mods
- **[Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/irisshaders)** - adds support for shaders
- **[Ok Zoomer](https://modrinth.com/mod/ok-zoomer)** - adds zooming
- **[Puzzle](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzle)** - Custom resourcepack splash screen
- **[Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)** - Adds extra features to the Sodium settings
- **[EMF (Entity Model Features)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)** - Custom Entity Models
- **[ETF (Entity Texture Features)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-texture-features)** - Emissive, Random & Custom Textures for Entities
- **[Ferrite Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)** - Reduces memory usage.
- **[ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)** - Improves rendering performance.
- **[Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium)** - Adds compatibility with Sodium for rendering mods.
- **[More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling)** - Further reduces rendering load.
- **[Cit resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)** - Mod for renaming textures

</details>

<details>
<summary>Additional Mods</summary>

### Additional Mods:

- **[FastQuit](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastquit)** - fast quit from servers or local worlds.
- **[Full Brightness Toggle](https://modrinth.com/mod/full-brightness-toggle)** - Expanding the standard brightness limits.
- **[Idle Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/idletweaks)** - Improved performance at idle.
- **[In-Game Account Switcher](https://modrinth.com/mod/in-game-account-switcher)** - Switch accounts in game.
- **[Isometric Renders](https://modrinth.com/mod/isometric-renders)** - isometric screenshot creation.
- **[Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload)** - fast language change.
- **[Let Me Despawn](https://modrinth.com/mod/lmd)** - Despawn unnecessary entities.
- **[Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)** - Server performance optimization.
- **[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)** - Menu for mod control.
- **[No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports)** - Disable chat reports.
- **[Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations)** - Additional animations.
- **[Packet Fixer](https://modrinth.com/mod/packet-fixer)** - fix server packets.
- **[Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps)** - Realistic footstep sounds.
- **[Smooth Scroll](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-scroll)** - Smooth scrolling of interfaces.
- **[Status Effect Bars](https://modrinth.com/mod/status-effect-bars)** - Effect status bars.
- **[Very Many Players](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric)** - Fixes lags with a large number of players.
- **[Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality)** - Visual effects for the environment.
- **[Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)** - Minimap.
- **[Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)** - fullscreen world map.
- **[Cubes Without Borders](https://modrinth.com/mod/cubes-without-borders)** - The game does not minimize when switching to another monitor.
- **[Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone)** - adds more extensive support for Optifine resourcepacks.
- **[BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3)** - Customizable debug HUD for Minecraft.

</details>

**_The modpack also contains resourcepacks and shaders._**

# Support
If you need any help or have suggestions on how to improve the build you can message me on my [Discord](https://discordapp.com/users/1139645780622319717)
